title: cicerbita conferta
intro: Cicerbita conferta, also known as the globe daisy or blue lettuce, is a perennial plant in the Asteraceae family that is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani systems, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cicerbita conferta include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Cicerbita conferta is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used as a tincture or in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
